title: scrophularia humilis
intro: Scrophularia humilis, also known as dwarf figwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have medicinal properties in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Scrophularia humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, fever, and respiratory issues. Scrophularia humilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the dried roots and leaves being the most commonly used parts for herbal preparations.
